mapper.select: select a.id as id, b.password as password, c.max_contacts as max_contacts, a.context as context, a.transport as transport, a.allow as allow, coalesce(a.record_yn, 'y') as record_yn, b.username as callerid from asterisk.ps_endpoints a left join asterisk.ps_auths b on a.id = b.id left join asterisk.ps_aors c on a.id = c.id WHERE 1=1 and a.id like concat('%', #{id}, '%')

select name as name, musiconhold as musiconhold, strategy as strategy, timeout as timeout, ringinuse as ringinuse, context as context from asterisk.queues WHERE 1=1 AND name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')

select replace(interface, 'pjsip/', '') as interface_no, membername as membername, penalty as penalty, paused as paused, wrapuptime as wrapuptime from asterisk.queue_members where queue_name = #{queue_name}

select context as context, exten as exten, priority as priority, app as app, appdata as appdata from asterisk.extensions where 1=1 and context like concat('%', #{context}, '%') and exten like concat('%', #{exten}, '%')
mapper.insert: insert into asterisk.ps_auths (id, auth_type, password, username) values (#{id}, 'userpass', #{password}, #{id}) on duplicate key update password = #{password}
insert into asterisk.ps_aors (id, max_contacts, remove_existing) values (#{id}, coalesce(#{max_contacts}, 1), 'yes') on duplicate key update max_contacts = coalesce(#{max_contacts}, 1)

insert into asterisk.queue_members (queue_name, interface, membername, penalty, paused, wrapuptime) values (#{queue_name}, concat('pjsip/', #{interface_no}), #{membername}, #{penalty}, #{paused}, #{wrapuptime})
insert into asterisk.extensions (context, exten, priority, app, appdata) values (#{context}, #{exten}, #{priority}, #{app}, #{appdata})
mapper.delete: delete from asterisk.extensions where context = #{context} and exten = #{exten}
